calendar.matters:
Petition For Enforcement Of Money Judgment Against Respondents Interest In Trust And Petition For Instructions Regarding Surcharge
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lauren Bradley for Jamilia Cuevas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court asked Ms. Bradley if she had heard from Mr. Earby. Ms. Bradley confirmed that Mr. Earby had been served but had not made any contact. The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant as supplemented and prayed, by deeming waived all affirmative defenses the respondent could have raised. The Court noted that this ruling is deemed a final judgment, reserving no further issues for the Court's later determination. Any subsequent petition seeking additional damages beyond what should have been raised in this proceeding will be precluded.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Enforcement Of Money Judgment Against Respondents Interest In Trust And Petition For Instructions Regarding Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Continued To Mar-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lauren Bradley for Jamilia Cuevas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held with regards to the proposed order submitted in support of the petition. The court noted that the proposed order did not specify the amounts being requested. Ms. Bradley confirmed that she will submit a supporting declaration with the amounts for fees and surcharges, along with a revised proposed order.

The court inquired whether the respondent is entitled to any offsets related to the rent and damages being sought for possession of the property. Ms. Bradley agreed that the respondent's 50% share of rent could be considered as an offset against the amounts being surcharged.

Ms. Bradley requested six weeks to gather additional documentation. The court continued the matter to March 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and directed Ms. Bradley to file any supplemental filings, including a revised proposed order, by March 4, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Enforcement Of Money Judgment Against Respondents Interest In Trust And Petition For Instructions Regarding Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Orders To Prove Existence Of Trust, To Remove Respondent As Cotrustee, To Return Trust Assets, To Compel Accounting, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge, And Prevent Respondent From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Removal Petition
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Orders To Prove Existence Of Trust, To Remove Respondent As Cotrustee, To Return Trust Assets, To Compel Accounting, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge, And Prevent Respondent From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Removal Petition
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Graham Douds appeared by zoom for Jamilia Cuevas (petitioner/co-trustee).

Mr. Douds addressed the tentative ruling stating that the requested relief is in number 6 of the accounting, and that he is happy to provide a declaration regarding the attorney's fees. The court noted that the petition/requests could have been clearer. Mr. Douds stated that his client has not been able to attain the trust assets, that he imagines the trust instrument may be in the house, but his client has no access to the house, and that he has not heard that his client has had any contact with Mr. Earby. Zaire K. Earby is ordered removed as co-trustee. The court will grant requests one through six. Mr. Douds is to file a verified supplemental declaration regarding his fees and costs by June 16, 2023 and is to provide notice. The Petition for Orders to Prove Existence of Trust, etc. is continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Text Ruling

Petition For Orders To Prove Existence Of Trust, To Remove Respondent As Cotrustee, To Return Trust Assets, To Compel Accounting, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Surcharge, And Prevent Respondent From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Removal Petition
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To May-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Graham Douds appeared by zoom for Jamilia Cuevas (petitioner/co-trustee).

The court noted that Zaire Earby was not present. Mr. Douds stated that he has had no contact with Mr. Earby, that as of March of last year all communication has ended, and that he has tried every form of communication (personal service/service by e-mail/mail). Mr. Douds also stated that without removal of the co-trustee, his client cannot gain access to the assets. The court suspends Zaire Earby as co-trustee at this time. The court will also issue an order to show cause to Zaire Earby to appear on May 30, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why he should not be permanently removed as co-trustee. The Petition for Orders to Prove Existence of Trust, etc. is also continued to May 30, 2023. Mr. Douds is to prepare an order re suspension.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Martinez. Not reported.

Petition For Orders To Prove Existence Of Trust, To Remove Respondent As Cotrustee, To Return Trust Assets, To Compel Accounting, Breach Of Fiduciary
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Continued To Apr-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
